positive: A mystical, symmetrical forest scene viewed at night. Giant bioluminescent flora with soft glowing veins illuminate thick, stylized ferns and ancient tree roots. The composition is highly detailed and centered, featuring deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and touches of glowing teal. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau and modern psychedelic graphic design, using clean, crisp silhouettes and strong contrast against a deep, cosmic background. Minimalist geometry should frame the main flora elements. Highly print-friendly vector quality, designed for textile apparel printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, low quality, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, messy, realistic photo, logo, trademark, cartoon, childish
